scenarios.description: child(2) returns third Element when three Element children exist (loop-3 branch)
scenarios.precondition: Element has exactly three direct Element children
scenarios.expectedResult: returns the third element without exception
pseudocode: TEST TC08 child index at upper valid bound

scenarios.description: child(1) uses cached shadowChildrenRef on second call (cache-hit branch)
scenarios.precondition: Element has two Element children and shadow cache uninitialized
scenarios.expectedResult: both calls return same second element and second call hits cache branch
pseudocode: TEST TC09 child cached shadow children list
